name: rtl-advisor
description: Evidence-backed pre-synthesis RTL review through the local RTL Advisor CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Review RTL before synthesis with traceable evidence.
interface.longDescription: Review approved combinational RTL, prepare a supported isolated adder rewrite, prove RTL equivalence, and explain measured Yosys/ABC evidence without changing the source.
defaultPrompt: Review approved RTL for timing opportunities.
Explain whether synthesis likely handles this RTL rewrite.
Show the evidence behind this RTL finding.
Measure a formally proven candidate in both pinned synthesis recipes.
